title: SidekoMcpGeneration
description: An asynchronous job that produces a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server from an OpenAPI specification managed by Sideko. One MCP tool is generated per OpenAPI operation so AI agents (Claude, Cursor, ChatGPT, Copilot) can call the API through structured MCP tools.

id.description: Unique identifier of the MCP generation job

projectId.description: ID of the parent API project

versionId.description: ID of the API version used for generation

transport.description: Transport the generated MCP server runs over

status.description: Current status of the MCP generation job

downloadUrl.description: URL to download the generated MCP server archive (available when complete)

toolCount.description: Number of MCP tools generated, one per OpenAPI operation

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the generation job was created

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the generation job completed
